query: When the scene is divided into four equal quadrants, which quadrant experienced the highest count of destroyed buildings and what is that count? Given: Imagesize=1024x1024

input.text: List all destroyed building bounding boxes in the post-disaster image.

final_answer: Now I will calculate the quadrant for each bounding box centroid and count destroyed buildings per quadrant.Given Imagesize: 1024x1024. The top-right quadrant experienced the highest count of destroyed buildings with 6 destroyed buildings.

whitelist: The top-right quadrant experienced the highest count of destroyed buildings with 6 destroyed buildings.

evaluation.question: Is the top-right quadrant identified as having the highest count of destroyed buildings?
Does the response specify that there are 6 destroyed buildings in the top-right quadrant?
